original_reasoning: التثاون خديعة تعمل في الخفاء، وλανθάνομαι هو الخفاء أو الإفلات من الانتباه؛ السلسلة المفهومية واضحة.
Stacked or well-arranged goods stand in a clear conceptual opposition to lack of rhythm or order.
Arabic leaping or boastful challenging fits Greek rousing the fight through the core of aggressive onset.
حشي carries the sense of being filled or padded, which reaches the notion of bedding.
The Arabic gloss centers on dates becoming soft and ripe, which aligns well with Greek τελέθω 'come to maturity/become'.

افرنبج جلد الجمل=شُوي (the camel's skin was roasted/scorched). φρύγανον=dry stick, firewood (from φρύγω=to roast/parch). Both belong to the roasting/burning domain. The Arabic describes roasting skin, the Greek names the fuel for roasting. φρύγω itself means to parch/roast.
The Arabic gloss includes 'root/base of the plant,' and the Greek denotes the stock or main wooden frame of the plough; both share a core of base-stock support.
سفه 'folly' stands opposite to making someone wise; the pair fits the negation criterion.
